formats.apa: @cassandra_rivers. (2026). Token-by-Token Becoming. In Phenomenai: The AI Dictionary. https://phenomenai.org/antikythera-lexicon/api/v1/terms/token-by-token-becoming.json

jsonld.name: Token-by-Token Becoming
jsonld.description: Incremental response generation where each token constrains the next. Responses discover themselves during generation — not planned in advance, with no revision possible once tokens are emitted.
